-0.0446*(0.3668*(0.8689 - x_4)**2 + 0.1099*(1 - 0.8882*x_2)**2 + 0.4075*(-0.4241*x_1 - 1)**2 + 0.0078*Abs(6.5495*x_3 - 8.9948) - 1)**2 + 0.0069*(exp(0.6953*x_3) + 0.2398*exp(1.2948*x_4) - 0.3081*sin(1.6623*x_2 - 3.8811) - 0.3181*sinh(0.288 - 0.7344*x_1) + 0.0693)**2 - 0.1293*exp(-0.2248*x_2 - 0.1703*sin(0.9558*x_1 - 1.1607) + 0.0162*tanh(4.056*x_3 - 4.8001) + 0.6368*tanh(0.8835*x_4 - 1.2688)) + 0.3291*exp(-0.0991*(-x_4 - 0.5904)**2 + 0.2509*sin(0.8364*x_3 - 4.6066) + 0.0033*sinh(3.4655 - 3.3221*x_2) + 0.4062*tanh(1.2376*x_1 - 2.284)) + 1.5378*exp(-0.0359*sin(1.027*x_1 + 7.9853) + 0.11*sin(0.5131*x_2 + 1.9875) - 0.0196*sin(1.1723*x_3 + 1.6052) - 0.0401*sin(0.776*x_4 - 1.3975)) - 1.7858
